hypothesis: Representations of matter learned by diverse scientific foundation models—across modalities (molecules, materials, proteins, and text), architectures (equivariant, non-equivariant, sequence, and structure-based), and training datasets—converge onto a common low-dimensional manifold that captures underlying physical and chemical structure, such that pairwise alignment metrics (CKNNA, IDCor, Information Imbalance) show strong mutual similarity in-distribution (OMat24, sAlex) but diminished alignment for out-of-distribution molecular inputs (OMol25).
